summary: TTS | Follow Team page load, top right team set
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user has the Atlanta Braves set as the Following Team
AND the user is on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects Following Teams
steps.result: THEN the app reader should say the following upon page load : 'The title reads: Add more teams to your clubhouse and help build your home screen on MLB.TV. You are following Atlanta Braves.Teams are organized in alphabetical order from left to right, and top to bottom. Press select to select a team to follow. You can follow more than one team. Once done, your selections will be saved and you can press or scroll left to navigate to the “Done” button. You can follow multiple teams. The {highlighted team} is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your Follow team. Move left, or down to hear additional teams to follow. There is nothing selectable to the right.'
